Financing structure (unsecured vs ECA, covenants, maturity ladder)
Detailed JV/TUI contribution modeling and reconciliation
Granular EPS sensitivity tables/quarterly beat decomposition
West Coast Mexico disruption quantification and mitigation actions
summary: The predicted set captured key themes on Med booking recovery, fuel hedging/sensitivity, yield decomposition (ticket vs onboard vs new assets), private destinations, and loyalty/card impacts, covering 7 of 12 actual questions with strong matches. Gaps were around Q4 yield confidence/quarterly cadence, PD Mexico construction status, whether European headwinds fully reverse in 2027, explicit itinerary changes due to higher fuel, and NA airfare sensitivity. Precision was solid given many predictions clustered on the core topics, but there was meaningful overprediction on capital allocation/financing, JV minutiae, and granular cost/beat breakdowns not present in the actual Q&A.
